title: What Assam’s Returning Government Must Deliver for its Tea Garden Community
description: Sustained political will and timely implementation are essential to ensure that electoral promises translate into long-term dignity and security for Assam’s tea garden communities Constituting nearly 20 per cent of the electorate and influencing outcomes in over 35 constituencies, Assam’s […] The post What Assam’s Returning Government Must Deliver for its Tea Garden Community appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
